name: Ranger 12x24 Horse Paddock Plan - An Open Run-In Shelter for Horses & Livestock
open_features: Extended roof span provides ample shade and rain protection for multiple horses or shared feeding areas.
Open Run-In Design with Slatted Walls
Partial horizontal slat walls add wind control and visual separation while maintaining airflow and horse-friendly visibility.
Straightforward post-and-beam framing with clean geometry makes this paddock ideal for DIY builders, ranch owners, and professionals alike.
Exposed timber construction delivers a timeless, durable look that pairs perfectly with fencing, barns, and rural properties.
description_summary: Kickstart your pasture upgrade with the Ranger Horse Paddock Plan - a 12x24 open run-in shelter designed for horses that need space, shade, and protection without confinement. Featuring a clean single-slope roof, strong timber posts, and partial slatted walls for airflow and visibility, Ranger offers the perfect balance between openness and shelter. Whether you're building a multi-horse run-in, feeding and watering station, or a flexible livestock paddock shelter, the Ranger 12x24 delivers ge...
